402856309.label: PL0100_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_1
402856309.jp_real: いいようにはさせない！
402856309.en_literal: I won't let you have it your way!

795054060.label: PL0100_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_2
795054060.en_literal: I'm going to remove the status effects!

365315450.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_dark_1
365315450.jp_real: カオスデトネーション！

624859356.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_dark_2
624859356.jp_real: ナラクノフォールダウン！

102658910.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_earth_1
102658910.jp_real: アースデトネーション！

974636983.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_earth_3
974636983.jp_real: ディアストロフィズム！

244957987.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_fire_1
244957987.jp_real: レッドデトネーション！

632192729.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_fire_2
632192729.jp_real: グレンノコラプション！

711272956.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_light_1
711272956.jp_real: アークデトネーション！

1008862748.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_light_2
1008862748.jp_real: ライデンド エラディケート！

200536188.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
200536188.jp_real: わかった！一気にいくよ！
200536188.en_literal: Got it! Let's go all at once!
200536188.english: Took the words right outta my mouth!

23258518.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
23258518.en_literal: This is the power of the Sky Spear!

319242932.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
319242932.jp_real: ねへへへ、みんなのおかげだよ！
319242932.en_literal: Hehe, it's all thanks to everyone!

510098130.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
510098130.jp_real: まだまだ油断できないね！
510098130.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.
510098130.english: Guess we can't go soft on 'em!

234651884.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
234651884.english: Yep, and I do it again!

152300074.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
152300074.jp_real: 手応えありましたね、カタリナさん！
152300074.en_literal: You put up a good fight, Katalina!

629662353.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
629662353.jp_real: ラカムさん、決まってましたよ！

17353299.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
17353299.jp_real: 魔法の腕に磨きがかかってるね、イオちゃん！
17353299.en_literal: Your magic is really polished, Io-chan!
17353299.english: You've gotten real good at spell-slinging, Io!

503360065.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
503360065.jp_real: 砕けた氷の欠片が綺麗で、見とれちゃいそうだった。
503360065.en_literal: The shattered ice fragments were so beautiful, I almost got lost staring at them.
503360065.english: The way you throw that ice around... it was beautiful.

454853317.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
454853317.jp_real: うわっちっち！すごい火力だ！

174440792.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
174440792.english: Caught him on the back foot!

206444274.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
206444274.jp_real: シャルロッテさんの奥義、かっこいいなあ！
206444274.en_literal: Charlotta's ultimate move is so cool!
206444274.english: Still one of the coolest attacks I've ever seen!

908442544.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
908442544.jp_real: あの速度で切り刻まれたら、ひとたまりもないはず
908442544.en_literal: If you get hit by that speed, there's no way you'd survive.
908442544.english: How many cuts was that? Lost count around ten.

177367557.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
177367557.jp_real: ナルメアさん、かっこよかったよ！

322836954.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
322836954.jp_real: すごい！これが伝説の拳！
322836954.en_literal: Amazing... So this is the legendary fist!
322836954.english: Amazing! Oh, he really is a legend!

295254906.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
295254906.jp_real: バザラガさん！助かりました！

610695519.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
610695519.en_literal: I'm all set, just like I wanted!

90770180.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
90770180.jp_real: さすがはサンダルフォンだね
90770180.english: That's why they call you supreme!

652060256.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
652060256.jp_real: シエテさん、すごかった！

9251154.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
9251154.jp_real: ガランツァ、張り切ってるな！

752870270.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
752870270.jp_real: 繋いでくれるって信じてた
752870270.en_literal: I believed you'd link with me!
752870270.english: I knew you wouldn't let me down!

835359976.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
835359976.jp_real: タイミングバッチリでした！

434340393.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
434340393.jp_real: フラメク！なんて威力だ！

306426920.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
306426920.jp_real: バッチリ決まってました！
306426920.english: No one does it like us!

828221931.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
828221931.jp_real: ラカムさんのおかげです！

900930942.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
900930942.jp_real: はい！みんなのおかげです！
900930942.en_literal: Yes! It's all thanks to everyone!

604126288.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
604126288.jp_real: フェリちゃんとペットたちのおかげだよ！
604126288.en_literal: Thanks to you and the pets, Ferry!
604126288.english: A little training goes a long way!

964769161.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
964769161.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!
964769161.english: Hah! Plenty more where that came from!

1049618086.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1049618086.en_literal: You've got some fight in you, Vane.

1041192049.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
1041192049.jp_real: ジークフリートさんこそ！
1041192049.english: Not as good as you, Siegfried!

150461599.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
150461599.jp_real: シャルロッテさんもね
150461599.english: I was just thinking the same thing!

48509806.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
48509806.en_literal: I'm coming at you with everything I've got!

413786390.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
413786390.jp_real: やりましたね、ゼタさん！

307897318.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
307897318.english: It's easy when we're all on the same page!

272428376.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
272428376.jp_real: 力を合わせて頑張ろう！
272428376.en_literal: Let's combine our powers and do our best!
272428376.english: There's no shame in asking for help!

633713120.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
633713120.jp_real: もっともっと、上を目指すよ！

820071651.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
820071651.jp_real: 頼りにさせてもらいます！
820071651.english: Let's hope it doesn't come to that.

361800137.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
361800137.en_literal: Could it be the result of my training?
361800137.english: I have gone extra rounds with Sir Baggins.

630145526.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
630145526.jp_real: よし！この調子で行こう！
630145526.en_literal: Alright, let's keep this momentum going!

39860271.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
39860271.jp_real: マギラフリラがいて、心強いよ！
39860271.en_literal: I've got Maglielle and Frieren with me. I'm feeling confident!
39860271.english: I don't just trust you. I believe in you.

874900759.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
874900759.english: There's more where that came from!

180722439.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
180722439.jp_real: へへへ、ちゃんと考えてるんだから！
180722439.en_literal: Hehe, I've got this all figured out!
180722439.english: Hehe, I knew that it would!

14816066.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_water_1
14816066.jp_real: ブルーデトンネーション！

1054028454.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_wind_1
1054028454.jp_real: エアロデトネーション！

591559283.label: PL0100_vo_SP_charge_name_1
591559283.jp_real: ターン！テンペスタブレード！

1039041492.label: PL0100_vo_SP_charge_name_2
1039041492.jp_real: テンペストブレード！ハァァァ！

66659901.label: PL0100_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
66659901.jp_real: パワーアッパーアッパー！

888063894.label: PL0100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1000
888063894.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

179688144.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_A_2
179688144.jp_real: チャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

1016565232.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_A_PL2400
1016565232.en_literal: I don't need to be told!

860849594.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_A_PL2600
860849594.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

175448165.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_B_NP0300
175448165.jp_real: ここは任せてください！

1043164549.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_B_PL1900
1043164549.en_literal: I don't need to be told!

1025091145.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL0800
1025091145.en_literal: I'll finish you in one go!

501825256.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL0900
501825256.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

419413382.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL1000
419413382.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

923542393.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL1500
923542393.jp_real: ギャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

131177945.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL1700
131177945.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

394393570.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL2500
394393570.en_literal: Let's do it all at once!

693495391.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_la_self_3
693495391.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

782998811.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
782998811.jp_real: 風を操る星晶獣、強敵だね
782998811.en_literal: Wind Manipulator, Holy Arrow. That's quite the skill.
782998811.english: We've beat wind primals before. We can do it again!

16550651.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
16550651.en_literal: I'll charge in with this momentum!

545158425.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
545158425.jp_real: グランサイファーを傷つけるな！

1006343200.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
1006343200.jp_real: ここで足止めされてたまるか！
1006343200.en_literal: You think you can stop me here?!

218135985.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
218135985.jp_real: みんな、この調子でいこう！

712361094.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
712361094.jp_real: 負けんか！死角からの攻撃に注意して！
712361094.en_literal: You're in a fight. Pay attention to attacks from the front.
712361094.english: Those swords are killer! Cover each other's backs!

661545336.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
661545336.en_literal: There must be a way to win!

308124572.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
308124572.en_literal: Just 'cause I've got a lot of swords!

1006298427.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
1006298427.jp_real: お前たちに触媒は渡さない！
1006298427.en_literal: I won't hand over the provocation to you!

316849816.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
316849816.en_literal: How should I take it down?

643000962.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
643000962.en_literal: This is where it gets serious!

100667750.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
100667750.en_literal: I can't let my guard down yet!

666828619.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
666828619.en_literal: I can do it! Just a little more!
666828619.english: We've got this! Just a little more!

179873142.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
179873142.jp_real: 立ち止まる時間なんてないから！
179873142.english: We don't have time to mess around!

409317541.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
409317541.jp_real: 相手をよく見て戦おう！
409317541.en_literal: Let's take a good look at the opponent and fight!
409317541.english: Concentrate and we can win this!

697183116.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
697183116.jp_real: 私たちの邪魔をしないで！

1022571456.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
1022571456.jp_real: 連携なら、私たちだって！
1022571456.en_literal: If we link up, even we can...
1022571456.english: Our crew fights for what's right!

494091348.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
494091348.jp_real: 私たちには負けられない！
494091348.english: We won't lose to these clowns!

107620530.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
107620530.jp_real: これが私たちの力だよ！

519789363.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
519789363.jp_real: このまま攻め続けよう！

793769724.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
793769724.jp_real: 先へ進ませてもらうよ！移動！
793769724.en_literal: I'll go ahead and move forward! Id!
793769724.english: Okay, Id! You asked for it!

449125807.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
449125807.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!
449125807.english: You've held us back long enough!

36588507.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
36588507.en_literal: I won't lose... not at all!

178862750.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
178862750.en_literal: What on earth is this power...?

563090318.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
563090318.jp_real: 突破口は必ずあるはず！
563090318.en_literal: There has to be a way to break through!

148127005.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
148127005.en_literal: I can do it! Keep it up!

600635957.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
600635957.english: Victory is ours for the taking!

503079500.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
503079500.jp_real: 今の感覚を忘れないようにしなきゃ
503079500.en_literal: I have to remember how I feel right now.
503079500.english: We've come too far to back down now!

184654577.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
184654577.jp_real: フラカン！もう一度相手になるよ！
184654577.en_literal: Furakan! I'll be your opponent once again!
184654577.english: Furikin! We beat you once, we'll do it again!

66875977.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
66875977.jp_real: もう迷うことなんてない！

324694925.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
324694925.jp_real: やるべきことをやらなきゃ！
324694925.en_literal: I have to do what I have to do!

14843995.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
14843995.jp_real: 立ちはだかるなら倒すだけだよ！
14843995.en_literal: If you're going to stand in my way, I'll just crush you!

720453314.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
720453314.jp_real: やっぱり、あの時の聖晶獣とは違う
720453314.en_literal: Still... it's different from that time in Seishoju.
720453314.english: Well, I think its attitude got worse!

155711583.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
155711583.jp_real: この勢いで突き進もう！
155711583.en_literal: I'll charge ahead with this momentum!

36993135.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
36993135.jp_real: ガランツァに負けてられない！
36993135.english: We can't let Gallanza outdo us!

703442211.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
703442211.en_literal: I'm okay! I can do this!

203986078.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
203986078.jp_real: この勢いで突破しよう！
203986078.en_literal: Let's break through with this momentum!

719558579.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
719558579.jp_real: ジータ：躊躇してる場合じゃない！
719558579.english: Fear won't ever hold us back!

1011238924.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
1011238924.jp_real: すべてをかけて、倒してみせる！
1011238924.en_literal: I'll show you how to defeat it, with everything I've got!
1011238924.english: It's all on us, team! Let's go!

275644201.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
275644201.jp_real: 何が何でも食い止めるよ！
275644201.en_literal: I'll bite down on anything and everything!
275644201.english: We have to stop Angra Mainyu!

563647946.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
563647946.english: We'll protect this world! That's a promise!

400682619.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
400682619.en_literal: I won't let you get what you want!

1039389853.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
1039389853.jp_real: 私たちは絶対に諦めない！
1039389853.english: We won't stop until you're free!

794242293.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
794242293.jp_real: 見捨てたりなんてしない！

615014286.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
615014286.jp_real: みんなで力を合わせれば！
615014286.en_literal: If we all combine our strength...
615014286.english: Work together and we'll make it through!

413665696.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
413665696.en_literal: Uh-oh... I can't keep this up!

772401604.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
772401604.english: What can we do against him!

704406617.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
704406617.jp_real: ディリス！ルリアを返して！
704406617.english: Lilith! Let Lyria go! Or else!

680893741.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
680893741.en_literal: I'll get you out of the way!

1072685185.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
1072685185.jp_real: このまま聖堂に行こう！
1072685185.en_literal: Let's go to the Holy Road!
1072685185.english: Let's get to the monastery quick!

95865053.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
95865053.jp_real: イストリア様は必ず守る！

884448986.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
884448986.jp_real: 触媒か…見つかるといいけど
884448986.english: That catalyst thing better be near!

347556509.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
347556509.en_literal: The sky is still so vast.
347556509.english: Man, the sky realm is huge!

38409409.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
38409409.en_literal: I'll get you out of the way!

39181275.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
39181275.jp_real: これ以上は好きにさせない！
39181275.en_literal: I won't let you go any further!
39181275.english: This city doesn't belong to you!

806863438.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
806863438.jp_real: もう後戻りはできない！

473186881.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
473186881.jp_real: 進もう！きっとあと少しだよ！

249170572.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
249170572.jp_real: 登るしかない！この塔を！
249170572.en_literal: I have no choice but to climb... this tower!

473218060.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
473218060.jp_real: まだ油断はできないね
473218060.en_literal: I can't afford to let my guard down yet.

1010743403.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
1010743403.english: This is why we're the best!

734878238.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
734878238.jp_real: いい連携だったよ、みんな！
734878238.en_literal: That was a good link! Everyone!

117683658.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
117683658.jp_real: これが私たちの力だよ！

201288752.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
201288752.jp_real: みんな、気合い入れていくよ！
201288752.en_literal: Everyone, let's bring our spirits up!
201288752.english: Come on, guys! The fun's just getting started!

411136964.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
411136964.jp_real: みんな、気を引き締めていこう！

322027132.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
322027132.jp_real: みんな、まだ油断できないよ！
322027132.en_literal: Everyone, we still can't let our guard down!
322027132.english: Keep your heads in the game!

645935359.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
645935359.jp_real: うん、息ぴったりだった

888541282.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
888541282.english: The mana is strong with this one!

439553730.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700

439553730.english: What would I do without ya?

51905957.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800

967662509.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000

967662509.en_literal: Percival-san, I'll leave my back to you!

946392461.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100

521065888.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200

944932607.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500

769413268.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
769413268.jp_real: ゼタさんがいると、心強いな。
769413268.en_literal: It's reassuring to have you around, Zeta.

749615084.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
749615084.jp_real: さすがはバザラガさんですね！

608252308.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100

25012070.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700

251269805.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800

23664365.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
23664365.jp_real: ありがとうございます

293082921.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
293082921.jp_real: オイゲン！助かりました！

308318709.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
308318709.en_literal: Let's prepare for what comes next!

682409999.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
682409999.jp_real: フォローありがとうございます！

532730893.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600

4864889.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800

1073708767.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
1073708767.jp_real: 頼りにしてます、シエテさん！
1073708767.english: You've always got our back, Seofon!

1065058922.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
1065058922.english: Oh man, you make our lives so easy!

53271949.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
53271949.jp_real: ベアトリクスさん、次もお願いします！
53271949.english: Mind joining me for the next one too?

661872097.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2

166020201.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
166020201.jp_real: 次も頼みます、ベインさん！
166020201.en_literal: I'm counting on you again, Vane!

647008089.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
647008089.jp_real: 気を抜かずにいかなきゃ！
647008089.en_literal: I have to go without hesitation!

117352571.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100

972810064.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200

307915167.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
307915167.en_literal: Let's prepare for the next one!

466528801.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
466528801.jp_real: この調子で攻め続けよう！

896838249.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
896838249.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either!
896838249.english: Wow, I wish I could do that!

757259731.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
757259731.en_literal: I can't let you get away with that!

102727318.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500

320400802.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900

79684466.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000

706277446.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100

253140466.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
253140466.jp_real: シャルロッテさんこそ！

658076478.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300

383690488.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
383690488.jp_real: ありがとう、カリオストロ

623944225.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
623944225.jp_real: ありがとう、シエテさん

433320324.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300

130086840.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800

130086840.english: Couldn't do it without you, Fraux!

795303427.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900

795303427.english: You keep it up too, Fediel!

314693369.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0000

314693369.en_literal: Lyria, you can't push yourself too hard.

357973858.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
357973858.jp_real: ありがとうございます！ローランさん！

344009432.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
344009432.jp_real: カタリナ、今度は私の番だよ！

629486690.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
629486690.jp_real: イキピッタリでしたね

601836283.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700

708419825.jp_real: この調子でいきましょう！

464779551.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
464779551.english: Literally, not even I could spot you.

497967617.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400

947839359.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500

793496361.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600

612632594.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700

186070029.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
186070029.english: I'll hit 'em even harder next time!

584903041.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300

584903041.en_literal: Yes! I'll take care of the next one!
584903041.english: Yeah! I've always got your back!

770427647.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400

770427647.english: Glad to have you with us, Gallanza!

892970884.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600

892970884.en_literal: I'll show you the next one too!

540332491.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
540332491.jp_real: 勢いに乗らせてもらいました！

74878493.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
74878493.english: You're already that and more, Lyria!

218085735.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
218085735.jp_real: もちろんです、ラカムさん。
218085735.english: Who do you take me for?

274501153.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500

575617127.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
575617127.english: Come on! How often have you saved my hide?

267173094.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
267173094.english: I wanna be like her when I grow up.

528674915.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
528674915.jp_real: エヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘ
528674915.english: I'm not a toddler, you know.

734056205.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
734056205.jp_real: ナルメアさん、やっぱりすごいなぁ！

39005318.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700

39005318.english: Then I'll be right behind you!

918630177.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
918630177.en_literal: I'll go for it! Let's do this!

155753572.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
155753572.english: We'll get you to smile someday!

478529433.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100

936813.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300

602992665.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400

602992665.en_literal: I still can't afford to be careless.

631081197.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
631081197.jp_real: ベアトリクスさんもね

122454627.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700

122454627.english: Thanks, but I know my limits.

182364979.jp_real: みんな、今がチャンスだよ！
